summary: Iteration 3 frontend regression: validated all 10 P0/P1/P2 features for FisioAgenda Pro. Login OK (super_admin). Dashboard 'Precisam de atenção' renders Ana Clara (Urgente) + Teste de Gay (Atenção) with 'Ver perfil' links that navigate to /pacientes/<uuid>. Weekly chart 'Sessões por dia (semana atual)' renders Recharts BarChart with all 7 axis ticks (Dom-Sáb). 'Aniversariantes' section correctly hidden (no June birthdays — count=0). Pacotes tab is present between Metas and Anexos at index 13 of 14 (correct order). Novo pacote modal opens with title, 5/10/20 templates, and auto-calculation shows R$ 900,00 (10 × R$100 × 0.9) correctly. 'Novo paciente' modal produces 0 'Missing Description' console warnings — DialogDescription fix confirmed. Configurações > Clínica tab shows 2 file inputs + 'Logo da clínica' + 'Foto do profissional' labels + 'até 2 MB' / 'até 4 MB' helper text (verified in source). Configurações > Aparência tab persists theme in localStorage 'fisio-theme' (forest → ocean) AND survives page reload. AlertDialog pattern (ConfirmDialog) verified in code for /agenda delete (could not exercise live — 0 appointments seeded). Read-only testing — no Supabase data created/modified.

integration_issues.issue: session_packages table does not exist in Supabase yet (migration pending), so the useQuery stays in 'Carregando…' indefinitely instead of falling back to the empty state. Expected per task notes, but UX could be improved by catching the 42P01/relation-not-found error and showing 'Nenhum pacote criado.'

action_items: (LOW) PackagesTab: in queryFn, swallow Supabase 'relation does not exist' (PGRST205 / 42P01) and return [] so the empty state shows until the migration is applied — currently it loops on isLoading.
(INFO) Once the user applies /app/frontend/supabase/migrations/202606080001_session_packages.sql, re-test the full Novo pacote → Criar → Usar 1 sessão → Marcar como pago → Excluir flow.

(INFO) Could not exercise AlertDialog on /agenda because Supabase has 0 appointments — code path is correct (agenda.tsx:232-240 uses <ConfirmDialog confirmLabel='Excluir permanentemente' destructive />); when seeded data exists, the dialog will appear and the destructive variant will be applied.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.tsx is now 281 lines — still within the 700-line guideline. Consider extracting 'Precisam de atenção', 'Weekly chart' and 'Birthdays' into /components/dashboard/ subcomponents for clarity if more sections are added.
PackagesTab.tsx uses `(supabase.from as any)('session_packages')` to bypass TS types — once the migration is applied, regenerate Supabase types and drop the `as any` cast.

PackagesTab queryFn throws on error (line 76: `if (error) throw error;`). When the table does not yet exist this causes a permanent loading spinner (because react-query keeps retrying). Either return [] for the not-found case or set retry:false + show an error state.
configuracoes.tsx — the helper text uses 'até 2 MB' (with space). Consistent with toast messages. OK.
ConfirmDialog correctly maps to Radix AlertDialog (role='alertdialog'), with destructive variant applying bg-destructive class. Good replacement for window.confirm().

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable items (10/10 features verified; 1 sub-item — agenda AlertDialog — verified by code review only because no seeded appointments)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features are all green. Order of clinical tabs is now: SOAP, Anamnese, Funcional, Mapa de dor, ADM, Testes, Neurológico, Perimetria, Evolução, Sessões, Sinais Vitais, Metas, Pacotes, Anexos (14 tabs). After user applies the session_packages migration in Supabase, the PackagesTab will move from infinite-loading to functional. Also, the theme persists in localStorage under the key 'fisio-theme' (values observed: 'forest', 'ocean'). The 'Aniversariantes' card is conditionally rendered only when birthdays.length > 0. The 'Precisam de atenção' card sorts urgente before atencao. /agenda delete uses ConfirmDialog (AlertDialog) — code verified but not exercised live (no appointments seeded). Console still shows ~8-9 background 403/400/404 errors from Supabase RLS / missing tables (session_packages, possibly user_roles) — pre-existing and not blocking UI.
rca of the issue:
No bugs found in iteration_3 deliverables. Only friction point: PackagesTab loading spinner persists because the session_packages table is not yet provisioned in Supabase (expected — migration is pending). Recommended hardening: PackagesTab queryFn should treat the 'relation does not exist' Supabase error as empty list so the 'Nenhum pacote criado.' empty state renders even before the migration is applied. Verification details for the 10 features:
  1) /app/frontend/src/routes/_authenticated/dashboard.tsx:77-90 — attentionPatients query .in('classification', ['urgente','atencao']) + sort with urgente first; renders Ver perfil <Link to='/pacientes/$id' params={{id:p.id}}>. Live: 2 items (Ana Clara, Teste de Gay), 2 'Ver perfil' links. ✓
  2) dashboard.tsx:109-125 + 184-201 — weeklyChart counts per day-of-week (Dom-Sáb), rendered as Recharts <BarChart>. Live: 1 .recharts-bar series, 7 axis ticks. ✓
  3) dashboard.tsx:205-228 — Aniversariantes conditional render {birthdays.length > 0 && (...)}. Live: 0 (June seeded patients have no June DOB). ✓
  4) pacientes_.$id.tsx + PackagesTab.tsx — Pacotes tab added between Metas and Anexos. Live: all_tabs[12]='Pacotes', all_tabs[13]='Anexos'. ✓
  5) PackagesTab.tsx:149-235 — Modal with title 'Novo pacote de sessões', 5/10/20 templates, name/sessions/unit/discount/valid_until/payment/status fields. Auto-calc: grossTotal=unit*sessions, finalTotal=grossTotal*(1-discount/100). Live default 10*100*(1-0.10)=R$900,00. ✓
  6) configuracoes.tsx:140,151 — Two upload inputs with helper text 'PNG/JPG até 2 MB' and 'PNG/JPG até 4 MB'. Live: 2 file inputs + correct labels present. ✓
  7) configuracoes.tsx (Aparência tab) — Theme persisted to localStorage['fisio-theme']. Live: 'forest' → click 'Oceano' → 'ocean'; reload → still 'ocean'. ✓
  8) agenda.tsx:232-240 — ConfirmDialog (wraps Radix AlertDialog) with confirmLabel='Excluir permanentemente' + destructive. Code verified; could not exercise live (0 appointments).
  9) NovoPaciente modal: 0 'Missing Description' console warnings. ✓
  10) All routes loaded (auth → dashboard → /pacientes → /pacientes/$id → /agenda → /configuracoes). ✓
